Source of Wellness

Featured Ingredients

Six of India's most sought-after botanicals — each with centuries of traditional use and modern clinical validation.

Ashwagandha

Withania somnifera

Root extract, KSM-66 & Sensoril standardised. India's premier adaptogen — trusted by supplement brands globally.

View specifications →

Turmeric

Curcuma longa

Curcumin 95% standardised extract and whole root powder. The world's most studied anti-inflammatory botanical.

View specifications →

Tulsi

Ocimum tenuiflorum

Holy Basil leaf powder and extract — revered in Ayurvedic tradition and in high demand from functional tea brands worldwide.

View specifications →

Moringa

Moringa oleifera

Leaf powder and extract — a nutritional powerhouse with exceptional protein density, iron, and antioxidant profiles.

View specifications →

Boswellia

Boswellia serrata

Indian Frankincense — AKBA-standardised extract for joint health formulations. Preferred by European and North American nutraceutical brands.

View specifications →

Cardamom

Elettaria cardamomum

Green cardamom pods, ground powder and essential oil — Kerala-origin, prized by luxury tea blenders from London to Tokyo.

View specifications →
View All Ingredient Categories
The Ayris Difference

What We Bring to Every Sourcing Partnership

Origin Intelligence

We know India's botanical supply chain at ground level — which regions grow what, which producers hold certifications, and how seasonal variation affects quality. You get intelligence, not just a product list.

Certification Depth

GMP, ISO, FSSAI, Organic (NPOP/NOP), Halal, Kosher — we match the right certification stack to every market. EU Novel Food, US FDA registration, EFSA compliance: we navigate it so your procurement team doesn't have to.

Responsive Partnership

Sample requests, specification sheets, CoA/MSDS documentation, pricing — handled with the speed your product development timelines demand. One point of contact from first enquiry to delivered shipment.

GMP Certified Suppliers
ISO 22000 / 9001
FSSAI Licensed
Organic NPOP / NOP
Halal Certified
Kosher Available

Ready to source from India's finest producers?

Whether you're formulating a new product line or looking for a more reliable supply partner, we'd welcome a conversation.
